sentence: go to a news site, accept the cookie consent banner if one appears, then open the top headline

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to a news site (BBC News).
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Handle Cookie Consent
workflow.description: Accept the cookie consent banner if it appears on the news site.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If a button with text 'Yes, I agree' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Yes, I agree'

workflow.name: On News Homepage
workflow.description: Identify and click the top headline on the news site.
triggers: If the current URL is https://www.bbc.com/news
If an element with data-entityid='container-top-stories' is visible
actions: Click the first link with class 'gs-c-promo-heading__title' that is a descendant of an element with data-entityid='container-top-stories'

workflow.name: On Headline Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the top headline article has been successfully opened.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news/
If an h1 element is visible
actions: Terminate: The top headline article is open
